allow: Bash(schtasks /query /fo LIST /tn "NPS Egakat - Primera descarga" 2>&1 && schtasks /query /fo LIST /tn "NPS Egakat - CSAT Mensual" 2>&1 && schtasks /query /fo LIST /tn "NPS Egakat - NPS Trimestral" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object {$_.TaskName -like 'NPS Egakat*'} | Select-Object TaskName, State, @{N='NextRun';E={\(Get-ScheduledTaskInfo $_.TaskName\).NextRunTime}} | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'NPS Egakat*' | Select-Object TaskName, State | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1)
